news.title:
Tata Motors targets Iveco acquisition by Q1 FY27, subject to approvals.
Domestically, Tata Motors faces a challenging and unpredictable FY27.
news.summary:

news.title:
Titan hit a 52-week high at ₹4,523.9; surged 10% this week.
Tata Motors PV gained 13% weekly, CV arm rose 15%, up in 4 of 5 sessions.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Motors will host Investor Day in Mumbai on June 23, 2026.
Registration closes May 30, 2026; event details and updates on cv.tatamotors.com.
news.summary:
Tata Motors will host Investor Day in Mumbai on June 23, 2026.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index surged 7%, led by Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, Eicher Motors, and others.
Crude price drop, stable production, and March auto sales boosted recovery from prior war-driven lows.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index surged 7%, led by Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, Eicher Motors, and others.
Crude price drop, stable production, and March auto sales boosted recovery from prior war-driven lows.

news.title:
PNB reports 10.8% YoY global business growth; CASA ratio at 73.7%. RBL Bank sees 24% YoY business rise; RBI approves 74% stake sale to Emirates NBD.
Tata Motors PV Q4 wholesales drop 14.5% YoY; RVNL secures ₹242 crore order. Emami to fully acquire Axiom Ayurveda for ₹200 crore.
news.summary:
PNB reports 10.8% YoY global business growth; CASA ratio at 73.7%. RBL Bank sees 24% YoY business rise; RBI approves 74% stake sale to Emirates NBD.
Tata Motors PV Q4 wholesales drop 14.5% YoY; RVNL secures ₹242 crore order. Emami to fully acquire Axiom Ayurveda for ₹200 crore.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley flags weak retail demand for Tata Motors PV, despite 29% YoY wholesale growth in March.
The firm maintains an 'equal weight' rating with a Rs 340 target, citing inventory risks and profitability concerns.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley flags weak retail demand for Tata Motors PV, despite 29% YoY wholesale growth in March.
The firm maintains an 'equal weight' rating with a Rs 340 target, citing inventory risks and profitability concerns.

news.title:
Tata Motors' PV share price is in focus as JLR Q4FY26 wholesale sales rose 61.1% QoQ post-cyber recovery.
FY26 JLR wholesale sales dropped 23.2% YoY, with Range Rover models boosting cash flow, contributing 77.1% sales.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' PV share price is in focus as JLR Q4FY26 wholesale sales rose 61.1% QoQ post-cyber recovery.
FY26 JLR wholesale sales dropped 23.2% YoY, with Range Rover models boosting cash flow, contributing 77.1% sales.

news.title:
Tata Motors' Q4 update shows sequential improvement in JLR volumes.
However, JLR volumes remain lower compared to the previous year.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' Q4 update shows sequential improvement in JLR volumes.
However, JLR volumes remain lower compared to the previous year.

news.title:
Tata Motors PV shares dropped 2%, trading 35% below 52-week high of ₹459.67, citing market weakness.
Geojit gives 'Buy' rating with ₹341 target, citing 15% upside, robust EV sales, and resilient financial performance.
news.summary:
Tata Motors PV shares dropped 2%, trading 35% below 52-week high of ₹459.67, citing market weakness.
Geojit gives 'Buy' rating with ₹341 target, citing 15% upside, robust EV sales, and resilient financial performance.

news.title:
Tata Motors' March commercial vehicle sales hit 47,976 units, exceeding 46,000 target.
Sales rose 17% YoY from 41,122 units, showcasing strong growth.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' March commercial vehicle sales hit 47,976 units, exceeding 46,000 target.
Sales rose 17% YoY from 41,122 units, showcasing strong growth.

news.title:
Tata Motors CEO emphasizes agility amid geopolitical and macro changes.
Diesel prices and related demand-cost impacts closely monitored by Tata Motors.
news.summary:
Tata Motors CEO emphasizes agility amid geopolitical and macro changes.
Diesel prices and related demand-cost impacts closely monitored by Tata Motors.

news.title:
Tata Motors reported double-digit YoY sales growth in March, despite slowing growth.
The company emphasized resilient production plans amid West Asia conflict and uncertainty.
news.summary:
Tata Motors reported double-digit YoY sales growth in March, despite slowing growth.
The company emphasized resilient production plans amid West Asia conflict and uncertainty.

news.title:
Tata Motors delivered 1,32,465 units in Q4 FY26, up 25% YoY. Domestic CV sales grew 26%.
FY26 sales rose 14% to 4,28,329 units. EV volumes surged 59%, indicating strong adoption.
news.summary:
Tata Motors delivered 1,32,465 units in Q4 FY26, up 25% YoY. Domestic CV sales grew 26%.
FY26 sales rose 14% to 4,28,329 units. EV volumes surged 59%, indicating strong adoption.

news.title:
Tata Motors' March CV sales rose to 47,976 units, up from 41,122 YoY.
Actual sales surpassed estimates of 46,000 units for the month.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' March CV sales rose to 47,976 units, up from 41,122 YoY.
Actual sales surpassed estimates of 46,000 units for the month.

news.title:
Auto stocks surged as Nifty Auto index rose 3.7%, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.6% gain.
Jefferies forecasts double-digit YoY growth for OEMs like Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, and TVS Motor.
news.summary:
Auto stocks surged as Nifty Auto index rose 3.7%, outperforming Nifty 50's 2.6% gain.
Jefferies forecasts double-digit YoY growth for OEMs like Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, and TVS Motor.

news.title:
Karnataka ends EV tax exemption; introduces graded lifetime tax based on vehicle cost.
EV stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Exide, and Olectra may see focus amid policy shift.
news.summary:
Karnataka ends EV tax exemption; introduces graded lifetime tax based on vehicle cost.
EV stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Exide, and Olectra may see focus amid policy shift.

news.title:
Tata Motors' CV sales soared 17% YoY in March 2026; Q4 FY26 sales rose 25% YoY to 132,465 units.
FY26 volumes grew 14% to 428,329 units; new launches like Ace Pro and Azura boosted competitiveness.
news.summary:
Tata Motors' CV sales soared 17% YoY in March 2026; Q4 FY26 sales rose 25% YoY to 132,465 units.
FY26 volumes grew 14% to 428,329 units; new launches like Ace Pro and Azura boosted competitiveness.

news.title:
Tata Motors PV sales expected to rise 37% YoY to 70,837 units in March 2026.
M&M SUV sales may grow 24.8% YoY; Maruti Suzuki sales estimated at 2.3 lakh units, up 19.8%.
news.summary:
Tata Motors PV sales expected to rise 37% YoY to 70,837 units in March 2026.
M&M SUV sales may grow 24.8% YoY; Maruti Suzuki sales estimated at 2.3 lakh units, up 19.8%.

news.title:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland fell 9% and 5% intraday, underperforming BSE Auto index (-1.9%).
Oil price surge amid West Asia war threatens inflation, CV demand, and GDP growth despite healthy retail CV demand.
news.summary:
Tata Motors and Ashok Leyland fell 9% and 5% intraday, underperforming BSE Auto index (-1.9%).
Oil price surge amid West Asia war threatens inflation, CV demand, and GDP growth despite healthy retail CV demand.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.
Tata Motors and Mahindra manage supply risks; MSMEs face shutdowns. Firms shift to localisation, inventory buffers, and logistical reroutes.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions challenge India's auto industry with raw material and energy strains impacting production and exports.
Tata Motors and Mahindra manage supply risks; MSMEs face shutdowns. Firms shift to localisation, inventory buffers, and logistical reroutes.
